ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model run belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the model run was executed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the model run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model run */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model run */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model run was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the metric belongs to */,
  "h_estimate" REAL /* Estimated value of the performance metric */,
  "h_error" REAL /* Error of the estimated value */,
  "mu" REAL /* Mean (mu) of the performance metric */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Standard deviation (sigma) of the performance metric */,
  "t" INTEGER /* Type of performance metric (e.g., 1 for regression) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance metric */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the performance metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter value (e.g., float, integer, string) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the hyperparameter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the hyperparameter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, csv) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active or inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)
